_comment: Hand-derived from SPEC.md § Validation and from exactly what corpus-b-edges breaks. This is the complete set of issues `dbmd validate --all --json tests/corpora/corpus-b-edges` MUST emit — no more, no fewer. Every issue is intent-derived (what MUST be true per the SPEC), never copied from tool output. NOT_A_STORE lives in EXPECTED/not-a-store.json (separate invocation). POLICY_FROZEN_PAGE lives in EXPECTED/policy-refusal/ (write-time). See EXPECTED/README.md for the per-code fixture map and the precedence rules. Issues are sorted by (file, line, code) for stable diffing; compare order-independently or sort tool output identically.

issues.message: log entry header timestamp '2026-13-99 99:99' is unparseable
issues.suggestion: fix the header to '## [YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM] <kind> | <object>' with a valid time

issues.message: log entry kind 'frobnicate' is not a recognized kind
issues.suggestion: use a recognized kind (ingest/create/update/delete/rename/link/validate/index-rebuild/contradiction) or accept the custom kind

issues.message: log entry '2026-05-02 08:00' precedes the previous entry '2026-05-03 11:00'; entries must be non-decreasing in time
issues.suggestion: reorder the entries by timestamp (a later agent pass re-sorts)

issues.message: two companies share domain 'globex.com'
issues.suggestion: merge the duplicates with dbmd rename, or cross-link with dbmd link

issues.message: index lists 'records/companies/ghost-corp' which no longer exists
issues.suggestion: run dbmd index rebuild --folder records/companies to drop the stale entry

issues.message: contact.email value 'chris [at] vendor dot com' does not match shape 'email'
issues.suggestion: use a valid email address, e.g. chris@vendor.com

issues.message: id 'shared-id' is declared by more than one file
issues.suggestion: give each file a unique 'id' (or remove 'id' to derive it from the path)

issues.message: two contacts share email 'ops@northstar.io'
issues.suggestion: merge the duplicates with dbmd rename, or cross-link with dbmd link

issues.message: index entry text for 'records/contacts/bad-email-shape' does not match the file's summary
issues.suggestion: run dbmd index rebuild --folder records/contacts to re-quote the summary

issues.message: file 'records/contacts/sarah-chen' exists but is not listed in records/contacts/index.md
issues.suggestion: run dbmd index rebuild --folder records/contacts to add the entry

issues.message: contact schema requires field 'company' which is absent
issues.suggestion: add 'company: [[records/companies/<co>]]' to the frontmatter

issues.message: contact.company is a plain string 'Acme Inc'; schema requires a wiki-link with prefix 'records/companies/'
issues.suggestion: replace with [[records/companies/acme]]

issues.message: wiki-link '[[acme-co]]' is not a full store-relative path
issues.suggestion: replace with the full path, e.g. [[records/companies/acme]]

issues.message: wiki-link '[[records/companies/northstar.md]]' carries a '.md' extension
issues.suggestion: drop the extension: [[records/companies/northstar]]

issues.message: index scope 'layer' does not match filesystem location (a type-folder)
issues.suggestion: set scope to 'type-folder' (or run dbmd index rebuild)

issues.message: two expenses share (date, amount, vendor) = (2026-05-05, 240.00, records/companies/dup-domain-a)
issues.suggestion: likely a double-entry; merge or delete one with dbmd rename

issues.message: expense.date value 'May 7th, 2026' does not match shape 'date'
issues.suggestion: use an ISO-8601 date, e.g. 2026-05-07

issues.message: two invoices share (vendor, date, amount) = (records/companies/northstar, 2026-04-01, 1200.00)
issues.suggestion: likely a re-entry; merge or delete one with dbmd rename

issues.message: invoice.status 'pending' is not in enum [paid, unpaid, void]
issues.suggestion: set 'status' to one of: paid, unpaid, void

issues.message: two meetings share (date, attendees-set) = (2026-05-22, {records/contacts/duplicate-email-a, records/contacts/sarah-chen})
issues.suggestion: merge or delete one with dbmd rename

issues.message: non-empty folder 'records/misc' has no index.md
issues.suggestion: run dbmd index rebuild --folder records/misc

issues.message: short-form wiki-link '[[northstar]]' matches multiple files
issues.suggestion: use the full store-relative path to disambiguate

issues.message: wiki-link target 'records/contacts/ghost' does not exist
issues.suggestion: create the target or fix the path

issues.message: frontmatter block is not valid YAML (unterminated flow sequence and quoted scalar)
issues.suggestion: fix the YAML: close the 'tags' sequence and terminate the 'name' string

issues.message: content file has no 'type:' field
issues.suggestion: add a 'type:' field to the frontmatter (e.g. type: contact)

issues.message: content file has no 'summary' field
issues.suggestion: run dbmd fm init records/misc/summary-absent.md to seed a default summary

issues.message: 'summary' is present but empty
issues.suggestion: set a one-line summary via dbmd fm set records/misc/summary-blank.md summary='...'

issues.message: 'summary' contains newlines; it must be a single line
issues.suggestion: rewrite 'summary' as one line (no block scalar)

issues.message: 'summary' is 247 characters; the limit is 200
issues.suggestion: shorten 'summary' to <= 200 characters

issues.message: 'index.jsonl' record for 'records/notes/malformed-tags.md' is stale (tags)
issues.suggestion: run 'dbmd index rebuild'

issues.message: 'tags' must be a flat YAML list of short scalar labels
issues.suggestion: use block form: one '- <tag>' per line

issues.message: type-folder 'records/playbooks/' has no 'index.jsonl' twin
issues.suggestion: run 'dbmd index rebuild'

issues.message: 'index.jsonl' record for 'records/processes/invoicing.md' is stale (summary)
issues.suggestion: run 'dbmd index rebuild'

issues.message: file has type 'test' which DB.md ## Policies → ### Ignored types lists
issues.suggestion: no action required; ignored-type files are ambient context, never synthesised

issues.message: two emails share (from, subject, date) = (elena.rodriguez@northstar.io, Renewal discussion - Northstar, 2026-05-22T09:14:00-07:00)
issues.suggestion: likely a re-ingest; delete the duplicate source

issues.message: 'created' value 'not-a-real-timestamp' is not ISO-8601
issues.suggestion: set 'created' to an ISO-8601 timestamp (e.g. 2026-05-23T09:00:00-07:00)

issues.message: sources/emails/index.jsonl lists 2 entries but the folder has 3 files (missing 'sources/emails/2026/05/bad-timestamp')
issues.suggestion: run dbmd index rebuild --folder sources/emails to regenerate the complete jsonl

issues.message: type 'contact' belongs in 'records/' but this file is under 'wiki/'
issues.suggestion: move the file under 'records/' (its canonical layer), or change its 'type:'

issues.message: index.md sits in empty / non-canonical folder 'wiki/people'
issues.suggestion: run dbmd index rebuild to delete the orphan index

issues.message: wiki-page derives from 'records/scratch/throwaway' whose type 'test' is on the Ignored types list
issues.suggestion: remove the ignored-type source from derived_from, or delete this synthesis page

issues.message: frontmatter list 'derived_from' uses flow form '[[[a]], [[b]]]' which YAML parses as a nested list
issues.suggestion: use the YAML block-sequence form, one '- [[path]]' per line
